name: napkin
description: End-to-end spec pipeline: turn a raw idea into a validated, build-seeded brief, judge it into a curated, feasibility-checked MVP feature list (per-feature reachability verdicts), then fork — BUILD it (collect a SaaS app's context — product, personas, glossary, capability map, RBAC, NFRs — into a flat spec/ workspace, author framework-agnostic Gherkin/BDD specs, and design + live-test a normalized DBML data model) or SELL it (settle the marketing message in spec/positioning.md, then render fact-faithful, on-voice landing/email/ads/social/launch copy to spec/copy/) — one aligned, drift-free flow from idea to features, schema, and go-to-market copy.
